    • getEventsByOrganizer

      public void getEventsByOrganizer(String organizerId, com.google.firebase.firestore.EventListener<com.google.firebase.firestore.QuerySnapshot> listener)
      Sets up a real-time listener for events created by a specific organizer.

    • getEvent

      public void getEvent(String eventId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Event> successListener, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener failureListener)
      Fetches a single event by ID.

    • addToWaitingList

      public void addToWaitingList(String eventId, String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> successListener, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener failureListener)
      Adds a deviceId to the event's waitingListIds array in Firestore. Also increments the waitingListCount field. Uses Firestore's ArrayUnion to safely add without duplicates.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant joining the waiting list
      successListener - called when the operation completes successfully
      failureListener - called if the operation fails

    • removeFromWaitingList

      public void removeFromWaitingList(String eventId, String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> successListener, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener failureListener)
      /** Removes a deviceId from the event's waitingListIds array in Firestore. Also decrements the waitingListCount field. Uses Firestore's ArrayRemove to safely remove the deviceId.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant leaving the waiting list
      successListener - called when the operation completes successfully
      failureListener - called if the operation fails

    • addToConfirmedAttendees

      public void addToConfirmedAttendees(String eventId, String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> successListener, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener failureListener)
      Atomically adds a given device ID to an event's confirmed attendees list in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant who accepted
      successListener - called when the operation completes successfully
      failureListener - called if the operation fails
